name: Palantir Technologies Inc.
one_liner: Palantir builds and deploys data integration, analytics, and AI software platforms for government agencies and commercial enterprises worldwide.

ambiguities: HQ address varies across sources (Denver CO vs. Miami/Aventura FL); Denver used as it appears in official Palantir blog and multiple filings; Yahoo Finance/Wikipedia indicate a more recent relocation to the Miami/Aventura, FL area.
Total pre-IPO funding of ~$2.46B per Tracxn; Palantir went public via direct listing on NYSE in September 2020 and transferred to NASDAQ in November 2024.
Headcount of 4,429 is from the 10-K filed February 2026 (as of Dec 31, 2025); the Q2 2025 10-Q cited 4,164 full-time employees as of June 30, 2025.
Tech stack inferred from engineering blog posts and job descriptions; not officially disclosed in full.
Sector hint was 'eu-consumer' but Palantir is a US-headquartered B2B enterprise software/AI company, not a consumer company.
